title: Turn on and adjust Real Mirrors

messages.content: # Are you driving around and feel like your mirrors are not set up correctly? Follow this guide!

# Method 1
## Step 1
> Open Content Manager and go to Settings > Custom Shaders Patch > Smart Mirror > Real Mirrors > Active

## Step 2
> Open Content Manager and go to Settings > Assetto Corsa > Controls > Patch > Real Mirrors > Adjust Tilt controls to your preference

# Method 2
## Step 1
> Open Content manager and go to Settings > Custom Shaders Patch > Smart Mirror < Real Mirrors > Active

## Step 2
> In Game, open the **App Shelf** app

## Step 4
> Configure your mirrors (X, Y, FoV)
>  - Mirror 1 (Left)
>  - Mirror 2 (Middle)
>  - Mirror 3 (Right)
